services.name: Reddit
services.description: Social platform — posts, comments, subreddits, user profiles, search, monitoring via Reddit Data API. IMPORTANT: Reddit requires pre-approved OAuth apps as of Nov 2025. Auto-posting must comply with Reddit's Responsible Builder Policy. Default mode is MANUAL — auto mode requires double confirmation.
